login.title: Sign In
login.successPasswordChanged: Success! Your password has been changed.
login.youCanNowLogInAndContinueYourAdventure: You can now log in and continue your adventure
login.unlockExclusiveRewardsAndTrackYourOrders: Unlock exclusive rewards, and track your orders with ease.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitleLine1: Join our community of board game enthusiasts! 🎲
register.subtitleLine2: Fill in the details below to get started
register.subscribe: Subscribe to news, updates & special offers

success.title: Thank you for registering!
success.toastDescription: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
success.descriptionLine1: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
success.descriptionLine2: Please click the link in that email to activate your account.
success.descriptionLine3: Check the message for 5-10 minutes. If you don't find the list, please check your spam folder and resend it again.

forgot-pass.title: 🔒Forgot your password?
forgot-pass.descriptionLine1: 🧩 No problem! Just enter your email address below and
forgot-pass.descriptionLine2: we’ll send you a link to reset your password
forgot-pass.errorSendingResetEmail: Error sending reset email. Try again.

success.title: ✉️ Check Your Inbox
success.toastDescription: A password reset link has been sent to your inbox.
success.descriptionLine1: If the email address you entered is associated with an account, you’ll receive a password reset link shortly
success.descriptionLine2: Check the message for 5-10 minutes. If you don't find the list, please check your spam folder and resend it again.

resetPass.title: 🔐 Reset Your Password
resetPass.descriptionLine2: Now enter a new password to continue your quest
resetPass.toastTitle: Success! Your password has been changed.
resetPass.toastDescription: You can now continue your adventure

subscribe.title: Stay Updated & Get Exclusive Deals!

subscribe.consentLabel: I agree to receiving marketing emails and special deals

freeShipping.away: You're just {{amount}} away from FREE shipping

modal.subtitleLine2: Unlock exclusive rewards, and track your orders with ease.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMax: Password must be less than 128 characters

errors.signinGeneric: An error occurred during signin. Please try again.

deliveryOptions.title: Choose delivery option
deliveryOptions.customsNotice: Please note that all international shipments may be subject to customs duties and taxes depending on your local regulations. These charges are the full responsibility of the buyer and are not included in the item price.

shippingForm.copyBilling: Use shipping address as billing address

validation.firstNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.firstNameMax: Name must be at most 50 characters
validation.firstNameRegex: Only letters, spaces and apostrophes are allowed
validation.lastNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastNameMax: Name must be at most 50 characters
validation.lastNameRegex: Only letters, spaces and apostrophes are allowed
validation.addressMin: Address must be at least 5 characters
validation.addressMax: Address must be at most 100 characters
validation.addressRegex: Only letters, numbers and spaces are allowed
validation.apartmentMax: Apartment must be at most 50 characters
validation.zipMin: Zip code must be at least 3 characters
validation.zipMax: Zip code must be at most 12 characters
validation.zipRegex: Only numbers and letters are allowed
validation.cityMin: City must be at least 2 characters
validation.cityMax: City must be at most 50 characters
validation.cityRegex: Only letters and spaces are allowed
validation.phoneMin: Phone must be at least 8 characters
